summary: Hormuz Watch Box 01 keeps MMSI-111 / MV CALDERA as the replay anchor while GFW resolves HUGE IMO 9357183 to current MMSI 422206900 / IRN after 7 broadcast identities.
OFAC-listed Iranian crude tanker HUGE is broadcasting under a different MMSI than the SDN row.
Same IMO, changed broadcast identity; identity risk is supported but intent is not inferred.
Identity custody is supported by OFAC + GFW, with MMSI mismatch preserved as the key contested fact.
Recommend collection/provenance retention, not intent assertion.
Operator doctrine: inside the 72-hour Hormuz Watch Box review window, when identity is real but behavior is underdetermined, collect before intent.
Same doctrine now governs the wider Hormuz traffic/advisory synthesis.
